patches.hypothesis: The original patch incorrectly used Math.min to compare lengths, which led to overfitting. The refined fix will correctly compare up to the length of the shorter sequence and ensure both sequences have the same length at the end.
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug is caused by using Math.max to determine the length for regionMatches, which can lead to StringIndexOutOfBoundsException when one CharSequence is shorter than the other. The fix is to use the minimum length instead.
